title: M11 Mastery Check — Node.js Foundations
description: Quick applied check. No looking things up. Answer from memory.

questions.prompt: readFileSync() is appropriate in a high-traffic HTTP server.
questions.explanation: readFileSync blocks the event loop. Use fs/promises readFile or a callback-based approach in servers.

questions.prompt: Read a file 'config.json' and parse it as JSON using async/await.
What happens if you forget to call res.end() in a Node.js HTTP handler?
questions.answer_key: The connection hangs until the client times out. Always call res.end() in every code path.

questions.prompt: How do you get __dirname in a Node.js ESM file?
